tasks.title: Resolve a Customer 360 query
tasks.prompt: Using TMF717, assemble a correct Customer 360 view for the given subscriber.

tasks.title: Choose the right commercial action
tasks.prompt: Pick the appropriate offer/loyalty action for the customer's context and eligibility.

tasks.title: Predict revenue/retention impact
tasks.prompt: Estimate the revenue and retention impact of the proposed product-catalog change.

tasks.title: DOIL intent for the change
tasks.prompt: Encode the catalog/loyalty change as a DOIL intent with approval constraints.
